title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for March 3, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for March 3, 2021 web conference

## Wednesday, March 3, 2021 2:30 - 5:00 pm Eastern standard time (EST)
Purpose: This web conference will focus on forward planning for the Committee, including a discussion on the forward agenda, targeted questions, identified key reviews, and meeting logistics.
Agenda March 3, 2021
Welcome and introductory remarks Presenter: Committee Co-Chairs
